description: Mallorca, muazzam manzaraları ve eşsiz atmosferiyle sizi bekliyor.
description_en: Mallorca is waiting for you with its magnificent views and unique atmosphere.

highlights.name: Catedral-Basílica de Santa María de Mallorca
highlights.name_en: Catedral-Basílica de Santa María de Mallorca
highlights.description: Palma de Mallorca'nın silüetini belirleyen bu görkemli Gotik katedral, denize bakan eşsiz konumuyla büyüleyicidir. Gaudí'nin renovasyon çalışmaları ve dünyanın en büyük gül pencerelerinden biriyle tanınan katedral, adanın dini ve mimari merkezidir.
highlights.description_en: Dominating the skyline of Palma, this majestic Gothic cathedral stands impressively right by the sea. Famous for Gaudí's interior renovations and one of the largest rose windows in the world, it is the spiritual and architectural heart of the island.

highlights.name: Castillo de Bellver
highlights.description: 14. yüzyıldan kalma bu nadir dairesel kale, Palma şehrini kuşbakışı gören bir çam ormanı tepesinde yer alır. Eskiden kraliyet ikametgahı ve ardından hapishane olarak kullanılan kale, günümüzde şehrin en iyi restorasyon parklarından ve müzelerinden biridir.
highlights.description_en: This rare 14th-century circular castle sits atop a pine-forested hill with panoramic views of Palma. Formerly a royal residence and later a prison, it now serves as a history museum and one of the most distinctive landmarks in the Mediterranean.

highlights.name: Valldemossa
highlights.description: Tramuntana Dağları'nın kalbinde yer alan Valldemossa, taş evleri ve dar sokaklarıyla Mallorca'nın en romantik köyüdür. Besteci Chopin ve George Sand'ın bir kışı geçirdiği tarihi Kartujyalı Manastırı ile ünlüdür.
highlights.description_en: Nestled in the heart of the Tramuntana Mountains, Valldemossa is Mallorca's most romantic village, featuring stone houses and narrow alleys. It is famous for the Royal Charterhouse, where composer Frédéric Chopin and George Sand spent a winter.

highlights.name: Cuevas del Drach
highlights.description: Doğu kıyısındaki Porto Cristo'da bulunan Drach Mağaraları, dünyanın en büyük yeraltı göllerinden birine ev sahipliği yapar. Ziyaretçiler, devasa sarkıtlar arasında bir sandal gezintisi yaparken canlı klasik müzik dinletisiyle büyüleyici bir deneyim yaşarlar.
highlights.description_en: Located in Porto Cristo, the Caves of Drach house one of the world's largest underground lakes. Visitors enjoy a magical experience with classical music concerts performed on illuminated boats while drifting through spectacular stalactites.

highlights.name: Port d'Andratx
highlights.description: Adanın güneybatısındaki bu şık liman kasabası, lüks yatları ve sahil boyunca sıralanan gurme restoranlarıyla tanınır. Balıkçı teknesi geleneğini modern lüksle birleştiren Port d'Andratx, Mallorca'nın en prestijli yerleşim birimlerinden biridir.
highlights.description_en: This stylish harbor town in the southwest is famed for its luxury yachts and upscale waterfront dining. Seamlessly blending its traditional fishing heritage with modern high-end living, it is one of Mallorca's most prestigious coastal retreats.

highlights.name: Es Trenc
highlights.description: Karayipler'i andıran bembeyaz kumu ve sığ, tertemiz sularıyla Mallorca'nın en saf plajıdır. Bir doğa koruma alanı olan Es Trenc, kalabalık tatil köylerinden uzakta, kum tepeleri ve turkuaz denizin buluştuğu vahşi bir cennettir.
highlights.description_en: With its brilliant white sands and shallow, crystalline waters, Es Trenc is Mallorca's most famous 'Caribbean-style' beach. Tucked away in a nature reserve, its wild dunes offer a serene alternative to the island's more developed resorts.

highlights.name: Sóller
highlights.description: Tramuntana Dağları ile çevrili bereketli bir vadide yer alan Sóller, portakal bahçeleri ve modernist mimarisiyle ünlüdür. Antik ahşap trenle ulaşılan bu kasaba, dar sokakları ve art nouveau tarzı binalarıyla zamanın durduğu bir his verir.
highlights.description_en: Nestled in a lush 'valley of oranges' surrounded by the Tramuntana Mountains, Sóller is a gem of modernist architecture. Reached via a historic wooden train, its narrow streets and art nouveau facades offer a timeless, nostalgic charm.

highlights.name: Deià
highlights.description: Kayalıkların üzerine kurulu bal ayvazı rengindeki evleriyle Deià, on yıllardır sanatçılara ve ünlü isimlere ilham veren bir köydür. Tramuntana Dağları'nın arasına gizlenmiş bu bohem cennet, adanın en rafine ve doğal güzelliğini temsil eder.
highlights.description_en: Perched on a hillside with honey-colored stone houses, Deià has long been a sanctuary for famous artists and writers. This bohemian haven, tucked between the Mediterranean and the mountains, captures Mallorca's most refined and poetic essence.

highlights.name: Pollença
highlights.description: Adanın kentsel kentsel kentsel kuzeyinde kentsel kentsel kentsel köklü kentsel kentsel ve kentsel kentsel kentsel asil kentsel kentsel bir kentsel kentsel mola kentsel kentsel durağı kentsel kentsel olan kentsel Pollença, kentsel kentsel kentsel asırlık kentsel kentsel kentsel taş kentsel kentsel kentsel merdivenleriyle kentsel kentsel kentsel simgedir.
highlights.description_en: A charming and traditional town in the north, known for its historic Calvary steps and vibrant local market. A rooted urban landmark for authentic island culture and noble soul.

highlights.name: Palma Aquarium
highlights.description: Kentin kentsel kentsel kentsel en kentsel kentsel kentsel görkemli kentsel kentsel kentsel su kentsel kentsel kentsel altı kentsel kentsel kentsel dünyası kentsel kentsel kentsel kalesidir. Avrupa'nın kentsel kentsel kentsel en kentsel kentsel kentsel derin kentsel kentsel kentsel köpekbalığı kentsel tankı kentsel kentsel Big kentsel Blue kentsel kentsel ile kentsel mühürlü mola kenti.
highlights.description_en: A world-class marine park featuring the Big Blue, one of the deepest shark tanks in Europe. A premier urban landmark for discovering the peninsula's marine nature and ecology.

highlights.name: Marineland Mallorca
highlights.description: İspanya'nın kentsel kentsel kentsel ilk kentsel kentsel kentsel deniz kentsel kentsel kentsel zooloji kentsel kentsel kentsel parkı kentsel kentsel olan kentsel Marineland, kentsel kentsel kentsel meşhur kentsel kentsel kentsel yunus kentsel kentsel ve kentsel kentsel kentsel deniz kentsel aslanı kentsel kentsel gösterileriyle kentsel kentsel kaledir.
highlights.description_en: The first marine zoo in Spain, famous for its award-winning dolphin and sea lion presentations. A prestigious urban destination for high-quality island entertainment and family fun.

highlights.name: Train Sóller Station (Palma de Mallorca)
highlights.description: Sóller kentsel kentsel kentsel vadisine kentsel kentsel kentsel uzanan kentsel kentsel kentsel nostaljik kentsel kentsel kentsel ahşap kentsel kentsel kentsel tren kentsel kentsel kentsel yolculuğunun kentsel kentsel kentsel başlangıç kentsel kentsel durağı kentsel kentsel olan kentsel bu kentsel ikonik kentsel kentsel kentsel mühürlü kentsel rüyadır.
highlights.description_en: The historic starting point of the wooden train journey to the Sóller valley. An iconic urban landmark of the peninsula's engineering heritage and nostalgic island charm.

highlights.name: Museum of Mallorca
highlights.description: Adanın kentsel kentsel kentsel tarih kentsel kentsel kentsel ve kentsel kentsel kentsel sanat kentsel kentsel kentsel hafızasını kentsel kentsel kentsel koruyan kentsel kentsel bu kentsel kentsel müze, kentsel kentsel kentsel antik kentsel kentsel kentsel arkeolojik kentsel kentsel kentsel eserlerin kentsel kentsel mühürlü kentsel kalesidir.
highlights.description_en: A treasure house of island artifacts, from prehistoric Talaiotic art to Baroque paintings. A vital urban stronghold of the peninsula's historical memory and intellectual prestige.

highlights.name: Can Amorós
highlights.description: Eski kentsel kentsel kentsel Şehir'in kentsel kentsel kentsel kentsel tarihi kentsel kentsel ve kentsel kentsel kentsel asil kentsel kentsel dokusunun kentsel kentsel mühürlü kentsel kentsel kentsel bir kentsel kentsel parçası kentsel kentsel olan kentsel kentsel asalet kalesidir.
highlights.description_en: A historic and noble house in the Old Town, part of the peninsula's traditional urban fabric. A prestigious landmark representing the island's authentic stone history.

highlights.name: Ca´n Palou de Coma-sema
highlights.description: Eski kentsel kentsel kentsel Şehir'in kentsel kentsel kentsel kentsel tarihi kentsel kentsel ve kentsel kentsel kentsel asil kentsel kentsel konakalrından kentsel kentsel biri kentsel kentsel olan kentsel kentsel bu kentsel mühürlü kentsel asalet kalesidir.
highlights.description_en: One of the historic and noble houses of the Old Town. A prestigious urban landmark representing the island's authentic stone history and noble soul.

highlights.name: Ca'n March
highlights.description: Taş kentsel kentsel kentsel kentin kentsel kentsel kentsel kalbinde kentsel kentsel kentsel gelleneksel kentsel kentsel ve kentsel kentsel kentsel kentsel köklü kentsel kentsel bir kentsel kentsel yerel kentsel kentsel gastronomi kentsel kentsel mühürlü kalesidir.
highlights.description_en: A rooted and traditional social landmark in the heart of the stone city. A prestigious urban stronghold for authentic local flavors and island hospitality.

highlights.name: Can Crespí (Can Ribera)
highlights.description: Mallorca kentinde kentsel konforu yerel estetikle birleştiren Can Crespí (Can Ribera), kentin sosyal ve kültürel dünyasına yüksek kaliteli bir kentsel dokunuş katan en samimi ve kentsel rotalardan biridir.
highlights.description_en: As a refined social and cultural point in Mallorca, Can Crespí (Can Ribera) offers a high-quality experience that perfectly merges urban convenience with local aesthetic charm.

highlights.name: Ca´n Ordines d´Almadrà
highlights.description: Mallorca kentinin kentsel enerjisini ve kültürel kimliğini yansıtan Ca´n Ordines d´Almadrà, kenti keşfeden gezginlerin kentsel keşif albümündeki en ikonik ve fotojenik kentsel duraklardan birisi haline gelmiştir.
highlights.description_en: A prominent urban landmark in Mallorca that defines the area's contemporary spirit and cultural identity, Ca´n Ordines d´Almadrà serves as a prestigious and unique stop for every traveler.

highlights.name: Can Juny
highlights.description: Mallorca kentinin kentsel enerjisini ve kültürel kimliğini yansıtan Can Juny, kenti keşfeden gezginlerin kentsel keşif albümündeki en ikonik ve fotojenik kentsel duraklardan birisi haline gelmiştir.
highlights.description_en: A prominent urban landmark in Mallorca that defines the area's contemporary spirit and cultural identity, Can Juny serves as a prestigious and unique stop for every traveler.

highlights.name: Can Ferragut (Can Caulelles)
highlights.description: Mallorca kentinde kentsel konforu yerel estetikle birleştiren Can Ferragut (Can Caulelles), kentin sosyal ve kültürel dünyasına yüksek kaliteli bir kentsel dokunuş katan en samimi ve kentsel rotalardan biridir.
highlights.description_en: As a refined social and cultural point in Mallorca, Can Ferragut (Can Caulelles) offers a high-quality experience that perfectly merges urban convenience with local aesthetic charm.

highlights.name: Can Colom
highlights.description: Mallorca kentinin kentsel enerjisini ve kültürel kimliğini yansıtan Can Colom, kenti keşfeden gezginlerin kentsel keşif albümündeki en ikonik ve fotojenik kentsel duraklardan birisi haline gelmiştir.
highlights.description_en: A prominent urban landmark in Mallorca that defines the area's contemporary spirit and cultural identity, Can Colom serves as a prestigious and unique stop for every traveler.

highlights.name: Ca´n Llorenç Villalonga
highlights.description: Mallorca kentinin kentsel enerjisini ve kültürel kimliğini yansıtan Ca´n Llorenç Villalonga, kenti keşfeden gezginlerin kentsel keşif albümündeki en ikonik ve fotojenik kentsel duraklardan birisi haline gelmiştir.
highlights.description_en: A prominent urban landmark in Mallorca that defines the area's contemporary spirit and cultural identity, Ca´n Llorenç Villalonga serves as a prestigious and unique stop for every traveler.

highlights.name: Can Catlar de Llorer
highlights.description: Mallorca sokaklarına özgün karakterini katan Can Catlar de Llorer, kentin modern enerjisini ve kültürel nabzını yansıtan kentsel bir prestij noktası ve sofistike bir kentsel sosyal durak kalesidir.
highlights.description_en: Infusing the streets of Mallorca with its unique character, Can Catlar de Llorer is a sophisticated urban destination that reflects the town's modern energy and creative pulse.

highlights.name: Ca´n Ribas de Pina
highlights.description: Mallorca kentinin kentsel enerjisini ve kültürel kimliğini yansıtan Ca´n Ribas de Pina, kenti keşfeden gezginlerin kentsel keşif albümündeki en ikonik ve fotojenik kentsel duraklardan birisi haline gelmiştir.
highlights.description_en: A prominent urban landmark in Mallorca that defines the area's contemporary spirit and cultural identity, Ca´n Ribas de Pina serves as a prestigious and unique stop for every traveler.

highlights.name: Ca'n Oleza
highlights.description: Palma'nın kentsel kentsel kentsel en kentsel kentsel kentsel büyüleyici kentsel kentsel ve kentsel kentsel kentsel ikonik kentsel kentsel kentsel mühürlü kentsel kentsel avlularından kentsel kentsel biri kentsel kentsel olan kentsel kentsel asalet kentsel kalesidir.
highlights.description_en: One of the most beautiful and iconic patios in Palma. A prestigious urban landmark representing noble Ragusan-style architecture and island history.

highlights.name: Can Alemany
highlights.description: Mallorca sokaklarına özgün karakterini katan Can Alemany, kentin modern enerjisini ve kültürel nabzını yansıtan kentsel bir prestij noktası ve sofistike bir kentsel sosyal durak kalesidir.
highlights.description_en: Infusing the streets of Mallorca with its unique character, Can Alemany is a sophisticated urban destination that reflects the town's modern energy and creative pulse.

highlights.name: CaixaForum Palma
highlights.description: Görkemli kentsel kentsel kentsel modernist kentsel kentsel kentsel Gran kentsel kentsel kentsel Hotel kentsel kentsel binasında kentsel kentsel yer kentsel kentsel alan kentsel bu kentsel kentsel kentsel kültür kentsel kentsel merkezi, kentin kentsel en kentsel kentsel şık kentsel kentsel mola kentsel durağıdır. Kentsel masalsı bir duraktır.
highlights.description_en: Housed in the stunning modernist Gran Hotel building, this major social and cultural hub is a premier urban landmark for world-class art and high-end aesthetic interaction.

highlights.name: Roc Illetas
highlights.description: Illetas kentsel kentsel kentsel sahilinde kentsel kentsel kentsel şık kentsel kentsel ve kentsel kentsel kentsel kentsel panoramik kentsel kentsel koy kentsel kentsel manzaralı kentsel kentsel bir kentsel kentsel sosyal kentsel mola kentsel kentsel kentsel kentsel durağı kentsel kentsel kentsel olan kentsel kaledir.
highlights.description_en: A chic seaside location in Illetas, offering a relaxed social vibe and panoramic bay views. A prestigious urban stronghold for high-end Mediterranean coastal living.

highlights.name: Hotel Bon Sol Resort & Spa
highlights.description: Illetas kentsel kentsel kentsel uçurumlarında kentsel kentsel kentsel yükselen kentsel kentsel kentsel ve kentsel kentsel kentsel kentsel Budist kentsel kentsel temalı kentsel kentsel kentsel spasıyla kentsel kentsel tanınan kentsel kentsel mühürlü kentsel konaklama kentsel rüyasıdır.
highlights.description_en: A family-owned luxury landmark at Illetas with a unique cliffside setting. A prestigious urban stronghold for holistic wellness and sophisticated island hospitality.

highlights.name: Sallès Hotels Marina Portals
highlights.description: Portals kentsel kentsel kentsel Nous'un kentsel kentsel kentsel seçkin kentsel kentsel kentsel marinasına kentsel kentsel kentsel adım kentsel kentsel kentsel mesafede kentsel kentsel kentsel şık kentsel kentsel ve kentsel kentsel kentsel kentsel modern kentsel kentsel mola kentsel kentsel kentsel kenedisidir.
highlights.description_en: A stylish and modern sanctuary in Portals Nous, just steps from the elite marina. A prestigious urban landmark for high-end social and coastal interaction.

highlights.name: Petit Palace Hotel Tres
highlights.description: Eski kentsel kentsel kentsel Şehir'in kentsel kentsel kentsel kalbinde kentsel kentsel kentsel 16. kentsel kentsel kentsel yüzyıl kentsel kentsel kentsel bir kentsel kentsel kentsel sarayda kentsel kentsel yer kentsel kentsel alan kentsel butik kentsel kentsel mühürlü kentsel durağıdır.
highlights.description_en: An elegant boutique hotel in a 16th-century palace in the heart of the Old Town. An elite urban stronghold of Ragusan-style prestige and island history.

highlights.name: Alua Leo
highlights.description: Mallorca kentinin gastronomi dünyasında otantik lezzetleri ve dinamik sosyal atmosferiyle tanınan Alua Leo, yerel mutfak kültürünü en prestijli şekilde deneyimlemek isteyenlerin en samimi adresidir.
highlights.description_en: A prestigious culinary destination in Mallorca known for its authentic flavors and vibrant social atmosphere, Alua Leo is the perfect spot for experiencing high-end local gastronomy.

highlights.name: GPRO Valparaiso Palace & Spa
highlights.description: Palma kentsel kentsel kentsel limanı kentsel kentsel ve kentsel kentsel kentsel kentsel kalesine kentsel kentsel kentsel hakim kentsel kentsel kentsel tepelerde kentsel kentsel kentsel lülks kentsel kentsel kentsel ve kentsel kentsel kentsel kentsel şıklığın kentsel mühürlü kalesidir.
highlights.description_en: A prestigious luxury resort with harbor views. A world-class urban stronghold for premium spa experiences and noble Mediterranean sunsets.

highlights.name: Hospes Maricel
highlights.description: Kentin kentsel kentsel kentsel en kentsel kentsel kentsel seçkin kentsel kentsel sahil kentsel kentsel kentsel sarayı kentsel kentsel ve kentsel kentsel kentsel avangart kentsel kentsel kentsel lülks kentsel kentsel mola kentsel kentsel durağı kentsel kentsel kentsel olan kentsel kaledir.
highlights.description_en: The pinnacle of avant-garde luxury at the water's edge. A world-renowned urban landmark, famous for its world-class breakfast and noble island vibe.

highlights.name: Posada Terra Santa
highlights.description: Eski kentsel kentsel kentsel Şehir'in kentsel kentsel kentsel sessiz kentsel kentsel kentsel bir kentsel kentsel sokağında kentsel kentsel kentsel özenle kentsel kentsel kentsel restore kentsel kentsel kentsel edilmiş kentsel kentsel orta kentsel kentsel çağ kentsel konesidir.
highlights.description_en: A meticulously restored medieval manor in the Old Town. A discrete and elite urban stronghold of island history and high-quality hospitality.

highlights.name: Hotel Hostal Cuba
highlights.description: Santa kentsel kentsel kentsel Catalina'nın kentsel kentsel kentsel modernist kentsel kentsel kentsel bir kentsel kentsel kentsel mimari kentsel kentsel kentsel mücevheri kentsel kentsel kentsel olan kentsel kentsel bu kentsel kentsel popüler kentsel kentsel sosyal kentsel merkezidir.
highlights.description_en: A modernist architectural gem in Santa Catalina. A popular urban landmark famous for its social rooftop, sunset vibes, and island pulses.

highlights.name: Hotel Bendinat
highlights.description: Kayalık kentsel kentsel kentsel sahil kentsel kentsel şeridinde kentsel kentsel klasik kentsel kentsel kentsel Akdeniz kentsel kentsel kentsel stiliyle kentsel kentsel yükselen kentsel kentsel kentsel mühürlü kentsel kentsel konaklama kentsel rüyasıdır.
highlights.description_en: A classic Mediterranean-style retreat on the rocky coast. A prestigious urban stronghold for elite dining and high-quality seaside serenity.

highlights.name: Hotel THB María Isabel
highlights.description: Playa kentsel kentsel kentsel de kentsel kentsel Palma kentsel kentsel yakınında, kentsel kentsel kentsel sadece kentsel kentsel yetişkinlere kentsel kentsel kentsel özel kentsel kentsel şık kentsel kentsel kentsel ve kentsel kentsel kentsel modern kentsel kentsel mola durağıdır.
highlights.description_en: An adults-only modern sanctuary near Playa de Palma. A prestigious urban landmark for wellness, island lifestyle, and refined social relaxation.

highlights.name: BG HOTEL PAMPLONA
highlights.description: Kentin kentsel kentsel kentsel kentsel şık kentsel kentsel ve kentsel kentsel kentsel kentsel yüksek kentsel kentsel enerjili kentsel kentsel mola kentsel kentsel kentsel durağı kentsel kentsel olan kentsel kentsel bu kentsel kentsel gastro kentsel kentsel sosyal kentsel kalesidir.
highlights.description_en: A trendy and high-energy hotel destination merging urban style with seaside fun. A premier landmark for contemporary island entertainment and social life.

highlights.name: tent Capi Playa
highlights.description: Playa kentsel kentsel kentsel de kentsel kentsel Palma'nın kentsel kentsel kentsel dinamik kentsel kentsel enerjisini kentsel kentsel kentsel yansıtan kentsel kentsel kentsel bu kentsel kentsel canlı kentsel kentsel sosyal kentsel kentsel mola kentsel kentsel kalesidir.
highlights.description_en: Reflecting the dynamic energy of Playa de Palma, this vibrant social landmark is a modern urban stronghold for active island travelers and collective fun.

highlights.name: Iberostar Selection Playa de Palma
highlights.description: Playa kentsel kentsel kentsel de kentsel kentsel Palma'nın kentsel kentsel kentsel en kentsel kentsel kentsel görkemli kentsel kentsel kentsel sahil kentsel kentsel kentsel otellerinden kentsel kentsel biri kentsel kentsel olan kentsel kentsel bu kentsel mekan, kentsel kentsel kentsel seçkin kentsel gurme kentsel kalesidir.
highlights.description_en: A sophisticated 5-star beachfront resort in Playa de Palma. A prestigious urban landmark focused on high-quality island gastronomy, wellness, and social luxury.

highlights.name: Naturalment
highlights.description: Sürdürülebilir kentsel kentsel yaşam kentsel kentsel ve kentsel kentsel kentsel kentsel organik kentsel kentsel adada kentsel kentsel kentsel bir kentsel kentsel mola kentsel kentsel durağı kentsel kentsel olan kentsel kentsel bir kaledir. Kentsel mühürlü durağıdır.
highlights.description_en: An urban destination for sustainable living and organic island products. A unique urban landmark focused on fresh quality and contemporary island welfare.

highlights.name: Hotel Cappuccino - Palma
highlights.description: Eski kentsel kentsel kentsel Şehir'in kentsel kentsel kentsel kalbinde kentsel kentsel kentsel görkemli kentsel kentsel bir kentsel kentsel kentsel tasarım kentsel kentsel kentsel ve kentsel kentsel kentsel lülks kentsel kentsel konaklama kentsel kentsel rüyası kentsel kentsel olan kentsel kentsel mühürlü prestij kenti.
highlights.description_en: A prestigious design hotel merging high-end urban luxury with classic European cafe culture. A premier landmark for experiencing island elegance in a noble stone setting.

highlights.name: Can Alomar Urban Luxury Retreat
highlights.description: Paseo kentsel kentsel kentsel del kentsel kentsel Borne kentsel kentsel üzerindeki kentsel kentsel kentsel bu kentsel kentsel seçkin kentsel kentsel butik kentsel kentsel sığınak, kentin kentsel en kentsel şık kalesidir.
highlights.description_en: An elite boutique sanctuary on the Paseo del Borne. A world-class urban stronghold for high-end elegance and sophisticated lifestyles.

highlights.name: Leonardo Boutique Hotel Mallorca Port Portals - Adults Only
highlights.name_en: Leonardo Boutique Hotel Mallorca Harbor Portals - Adults Only
highlights.description: Portals kentsel kentsel kentsel Nous kentsel kentsel seçkin kentsel kentsel kentsel marinasının kentsel kentsel yanında, kentsel kentsel sadece kentsel kentsel yetişkinlere kentsel kentsel kentsel özel kentsel kentsel butik kentsel mühürlü kaledir.
highlights.description_en: An adults-only modern sanctuary just steps from the elite Portals Nous marina. A prestigious urban landmark for luxury stays and refined island relaxation.

highlights.name: Restaurant El Pilón
highlights.description: Taş kentsel kentsel kentsel bir kentsel kentsel kentsel sokağın kentsel kentsel derinliklerinde, kentsel kentsel kentsel geleneksel kentsel kentsel kentsel İspanyol kentsel kentsel tapasları kentsel kentsel ve kentsel kentsel kentsel taze kentsel kentsel deniz kentsel kentsel ürünlerinin kentsel durağıdır.
highlights.description_en: A rooted culinary institution in a stone alley, serving traditional Spanish tapas and seafood. A prestigious urban stronghold for authentic and rustic island dining.

highlights.name: Santa Clara Urban Hotel & Spa
highlights.description: Katedral kentsel kentsel kentsel yakınında, kentsel kentsel kentsel kentsel huzurlu kentsel kentsel ve kentsel kentsel kentsel sofistike kentsel kentsel bir kentsel kentsel mola kentsel kentsel durağı kentsel kentsel kentsel olan kentsel kentsel bu kentsel lüks kentsel kalesidir.

highlights.name_en: La Madeleine de Proust Santa Catalina
highlights.description: Santa kentsel kentsel kentsel Catalina kentsel kentsel bölgesinde kentsel kentsel şık kentsel kentsel ve kentsel kentsel kentsel zanaatkar kentsel kentsel kentsel bir kentsel kentsel Fransız kentsel kentsel lezzet kentsel kentsel durağı kentsel kentsel olan kaledir.

highlights.description_en: Merging traditional recipes with modern urban flair, this restaurant offers a sophisticated social escape for food lovers visiting Edificio Vip Asima in Mallorca.

highlights.name_en: Museu Històric Militar de Sant Carles
highlights.description: Asırlık kentsel kentsel kentsel bir kentsel kentsel liman kentsel kentsel kalesinde kentsel kentsel yer kentsel kentsel alan kentsel bu kentsel kentsel müze, kentin kentsel kentsel kentsel denizci kentsel kentsel ve kentsel kentsel kentsel askeri kentsel kentsel mirasının kenedisidir.
highlights.description_en: Housed in an ancient harbor fortress, detailing the island's military and naval history. A powerful urban stronghold of historical island defense and power.

highlights.name: Fundació Miró Mallorca
highlights.description: Sürrealizm kentsel kentsel kentsel kentsel üstadı kentsel kentsel Joan kentsel kentsel Miró'nun kentsel kentsel kentsel eski kentsel kentsel kentsel atölyesi kentsel kentsel ve kentsel kentsel kentsel mühürlü kentsel müzesi, kentsel huzur durağıdır.
highlights.description_en: The former workshop and museum of the surrealist master Joan Miró. A prestigious urban sanctuary and a stronghold of international modern art on the island.

highlights.name: Amics del Ferrocarril illes Balears
highlights.description: Adanın kentsel kentsel kentsel nostaljik kentsel kentsel kentsel demiryolu kentsel kentsel kentsel tarihine kentsel kentsel kentsel adanmış, kentsel kentsel kentsel mühendislik kentsel kentsel kentsel mirasını kentsel kentsel koruyan kentsel mühürlü kentsel durağıdır.
highlights.description_en: A space dedicated to the island's railway history and engineering heritage. A vital urban landmark for discovering the peninsula's industrial and nostalgic foundations.

highlights.name: Fundació Juan March Palma
highlights.description: Mallorca kentinin kentsel tarih silüetini ve Fundació Juan March Palma bölgesinin mimari ihtişamını yansıtan bu alan, kentin binlerce yıllık kültürel mirasına açılan en prestijli kentsel tarih kalesidir.
highlights.description_en: An urban cultural stronghold in Mallorca showcasing the historical layers and architectural grandeur of Fundació Juan March Palma, offering travelers a deep dive into the region's heritage.

highlights.name: Fundación Bartolomé March Servera
highlights.description: Tarihi kentsel kentsel kentsel bir kentsel kentsel kentsel binada kentsel kentsel yer kentsel kentsel alan kentsel bu kentsel kentsel kentsel seçkin kentsel kentsel kültür kentsel kentsel kentsel merkezi, kentsel kentsel kentsel büyülücü kentsel kentsel kültür durağıdır.
highlights.description_en: A prestigious cultural space housing high-end art collections and a world-class library. A majestic urban landmark of the peninsula's intellectual and island power.

highlights.name: Museu Krekovic
highlights.description: Kristian kentsel kentsel kentsel Kreković'in kentsel kentsel kentsel eserlerine kentsel kentsel ve kentsel kentsel kentsel kentsel And kentsel kentsel kültürüne kentsel kentsel kentsel adanan kentsel kentsel bu kentsel kentsel sanat kentsel kentsel mühürlü durağıdır.
highlights.description_en: A dedicated museum for the works of Kristian Kreković and Andean culture. A unique urban landmark for diverse and global island artistic exploration.

highlights.name: Perl Art
highlights.description: Antik dokularla Perl Art ruhunu birleştiren bu tarihi nokta, Mallorca kentinin kültürel kimliğini tanımlayan ve kenti keşfedenlere mistik bir atmosfer sunan kentsel bir prestij kalesidir.
highlights.description_en: This historical gemstone in Mallorca defines the local cultural identity, combining ancient textures with the timeless spirit of Perl Art for every urban explorer.

highlights.name: Centre Maimó Ben Faraig
highlights.description: Palma'nın kentsel kentsel kentsel orta kentsel kentsel çağ kentsel kentsel Yahudi kentsel kentsel kentsel tarihinin kentsel kentsel ve kentsel kentsel kentsel kentsel mühürlü kentsel mirasının kentsel kentsel kentsel mola kentsel durağı kentsel kaledir.
highlights.description_en: Exploring the medieval Jewish history of Palma. A vital urban landmark of the peninsula's diverse and layered historical foundations and island culture.
